mnemonics.title: Oozie Components - WCB
mnemonics.content: W - Workflow (DAG of actions), C - Coordinator (scheduler), B - Bundle (group coordinators). Think: 'WCB manages Workflow Control and Bundling'.

mnemonics.title: Control Nodes - SEDKFJ
mnemonics.content: S - Start, E - End, D - Decision (if-else), K - Kill (error), F - Fork (parallel split), J - Join (parallel merge). Think: 'Start, End, Decide, Kill, Fork, Join'.

mnemonics.title: Action Nodes - MPHSSJS
mnemonics.content: M - MapReduce, P - Pig, H - Hive, S - Sqoop, S - Shell, J - Java, S - Spark. Think: 'Many Programs Handle Several Specialized Jobs Smoothly'.

mnemonics.title: Coordinator Triggers - TD
mnemonics.content: T - Time-based (cron-like: every hour/day), D - Data-based (wait for files to arrive). Think: 'Time or Data triggers the workflow'.
